---
title: ""
---

# 0.0.0 Overview {.divider}

```{=html}
<div class="left-panel">
  <div class="number">0</div>
  <div class="label">OVERVIEW</div>
</div>
<div class="right-panel">
  <img src="images/0/0.0.0.png" alt="Section divider background for overview">
</div>
```

## 0.1 Intro to Vector Design {.content}

```{=html}
<div class="top-bar">0. OVERVIEW</div>

<div class="screenshot-row">
  <div class="callout-box">
    <img src="images/0/0.1.1.png" alt="Callout image for step 0.1">
    <div class="callout-label">
      0.1.1: Replace this text with your step instruction.
    </div>
    <p class="concept-insight"><strong>*</strong> Add the reason behind this step.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="main-panel">
    <div class="main-shot-wrap">
      <img class="main-shot" src="images/0/0.1.0.png" alt="Main screenshot for step 0.1">
      <div class="click-highlight" style="--box-x:10%; --box-y:10%; --box-w:20%; --box-h:12%;" aria-hidden="true"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
